basic_details.job_title: NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: New Mangalore Port Authority (NMPA) Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website newmangaloreport.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post through the NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age relaxation for PwBD/Ex-servicemen as per Government of India Guidelines. Employees of Major Port Authorities age limit not exceed 55 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution, Twelve years experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine Structures in an Industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking
qualification.details: Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil): Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Twelve years' experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine Structures in an Industrial / Commercial / Govt. Undertaking.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Document Verification Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NMPA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NMPA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil): Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Twelve years' experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine Structures in an Industrial / Commercial / Govt. Undertaking.

content_sections.heading: NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age relaxation for PwBD/Ex-servicemen as per Government of India Guidelines. Employees of Major Port Authorities age limit not exceed 55 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NMPA to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NMPA Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position is 05-08-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution, along with twelve years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 2,20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position in the New Mangalore Port Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of NMPA.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, followed by document verification and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mangalore, Karnataka, with the pincode 575010.
